input_pages.parser_plan: Direct REST API download of Zenodo metadata and records, followed by pandas openpyxl loading of sheet '9. Descriptors' and LLM-guided mapping to standardize column headers.
input_pages.expected_content: Tabular experimental measurements of Rhodamine B degradation efficiency (Eff_%) over TiO2_SiO2 and TiO2_N_col catalysts under UV and Visible light conditions.
input_pages.robots_notes: Zenodo permits API access and programmatic download of open dataset records without registration. Robots.txt rules respected by using public endpoint APIs.
